title: Fragmentary Icon Panel, Christ in Glory (?) and Evangelists
description: Fragmentary Icon Panel, Christ in Glory (?) and Evangelists, 750 – 850. Egypt, Abbasid period. Slit-and dovetailed-tapestry weave; wool; overall: 53.3 x 80.7 cm (21 x 31 3/4 in.); mounted: 63.5 x 90.2 cm (25 x 35 1/2 in.). The Cleveland Museum of Art, Purchase from the J. H. Wade Fund, 1952.256
